api_info.description: Drive your app to success with Lyft's API. Provides ride cost estimates, ETAs, ride requests, driver information, user profiles, ride history, receipts, ratings, and sandbox testing.

conversion.notes: Converted from Swagger 2.0 spec sourced from APIs-guru openapi-directory. Original spec served at https://api.lyft.com/v1/spec. Lyft developer portal (developer.lyft.com) appears to be offline as of conversion date.
